name: Chewey Walnut Squares
recipeInstructions:
1. Grease an 8-inch square pan.
2. Stir together the egg, brown sugar and vanilla in a bowl until well combined.
3. Quickly stir in the sifted all-purpose flour, baking soda and salt.
4. Add the coarsely chopped walnuts to the mixture and stir until evenly distributed.
5. Spread the batter evenly into the prepared pan.
6. Bake at 350 degrees Fahrenheit for 18 to 20 minutes, or until the cookies are soft in the center when removed from the oven.
7. Allow the cookies to cool in the pan before cutting into 2-inch squares.
